name: Takarek Jelzalogbank Nyrt.
summary: Takar√É¬©k Jelz√É¬°logbank Nyrt., together with its subsidiaries, provides mortgage banking services in Hungary. The company operates through Retail, Corporate, Investment Services, Treasury, Refinancing, and Other segments. It offers various deposits, savings, and bank accounts; housing loans, consumer loans, corporate loans, and commercial real estate loans; and bank cards and electronic payment systems services. The company also refinances mortgage loans provided by commercial banks to their customers. In addition, it provides real estate collateral valuation, investment, agency and sales, and management services; purchase, handles, and collects receivables of retail customers; investment services; electronic bill payment services; liquidity management, and asset and liability services; fund and property management services; leasing services; and IT services. The company was formerly known as FHB Jelz√É¬°logbank Nyrt. Takar√É¬©k Jelz√É¬°logbank Nyrt. was founded in 1997 and is based in Budapest, Hungary.
